hero.desc: Editorial-grade formulas backed by science. Discover supplements designed for human performance and cellular vitality.

articles.title: Collagen in Cellular Support: Beyond the Skin
articles.excerpt: New scientific evidence supports the use of type I and III collagen peptides for connective tissue maintenance. A deep analysis of the biological mechanisms.

articles.title: Magnesium and Deep Sleep: The Molecular Connection
articles.excerpt: We explore how different forms of magnesium affect sleep architecture and neuro-muscular recovery.

articles.title: Vitamin D3 + K2: Your Winter Ally
articles.excerpt: Why supplementing with D3 alone is insufficient and how K2 complements its function in bone and cardiovascular metabolism.

articles.title: Adaptogens and the Hypothalamic-Pituitary-Adrenal Axis
articles.excerpt: Ashwagandha, Rhodiola and Reishi: mechanisms of action on the stress axis supported by clinical trials.

articles.title: Gut Microbiome: The New Frontier of Systemic Wellness
articles.excerpt: Reprogramming gut flora with third-generation probiotics. Implications for immune, mental and metabolic health.

nosotros.desc: With over 6 years transforming clinical nutrition in Colombia, we combine cutting-edge science with an unwavering commitment to our clients' health.
nosotros.story_p1: Advanced Health Company SAS was born from a deep conviction: nutrition should be treated with the same rigor as medicine. We are a Colombian company dedicated to improving the quality of life for young people and adults through high-quality products backed by science.
nosotros.story_p2: We work with professionals with over 30 years of experience researching chronic and degenerative diseases, developing formulas that not only supplement but transform the health of those who consume them.
nosotros.story_p3: Our commitment goes beyond selling products. We want to educate, support, and empower every person to make informed decisions about their well-being.
nosotros.mission_p1: Advanced Health Company SAS was born from a deep conviction: nutrition should be treated with the same rigor as medicine. We are a Colombian company dedicated to improving the quality of life of young people and adults through high-quality, scientifically-backed products.
nosotros.mission_p2: We work with professionals who have over 30 years of experience researching chronic and degenerative diseases, developing formulas that don't just supplement — they transform the health of those who consume them.
nosotros.mission_p3: Our commitment goes beyond selling products. We want to educate, support, and empower every person to make informed decisions about their well-being.

values.title: Applied Science
values.desc: We don't believe in unfounded trends. Every formula is the result of years of scientific research with proven medical support.

values.title: Absolute Purity
values.desc: We select only ingredients with the highest bioavailability. No fillers, no artificial colorants. Only what your body needs.

values.title: Total Transparency
values.desc: Complete traceability of every batch. All our FuXion products have valid INVIMA health registration.

values.title: Social Commitment
values.desc: We believe quality health should be accessible. That's why we offer free personalized advice and wellness plans for the whole family.

values.title: Constant Innovation
values.desc: We continuously research and develop new formulas, incorporating the latest advances in clinical nutrition and ingredient technology.

values.title: Human Support
values.desc: You're not a number. Our team of advisors accompanies you every step of the way, from product selection to your personalized follow-up.

nosotros.brands_desc: We work with world-class brands that share our vision of holistic wellness and superior quality.
nosotros.brands_fuxion_desc: Leader in functional nutrition in Latin America. Innovative formulas with INVIMA registration that combine science and nature for measurable results.
nosotros.brands_gudd_desc: High-quality dietary supplements designed with a special focus on senior wellness. Formulas with valid INVIMA registration that support vitality, mobility, and quality of life at every stage.
nosotros.coverage_desc: We reach all of Colombia through our logistics partners. Safe and trackable shipments to your doorstep.
nosotros.cta_desc: Discover our complete line of science-backed products and begin your journey toward a fuller life.

soporte.title: We're Here to Help.
soporte.desc: Have a technical question or an order inquiry? Our clinical and support team is ready to assist you.

faqs.q: How can I place an order?
faqs.a: You can place your order directly through our online store or by writing to us on WhatsApp at (+57) 601 917 8558. We'll guide you through the entire process.
Yes, we ship to all major and intermediate cities in Colombia through our logistics partners.
Yes, our FuXion products have valid INVIMA health registrations and meet the highest quality standards. gudd products are cosmetic/dermatological use.

faqs.q: How can I contact an advisor?
faqs.a: You can reach us via WhatsApp, call (+57) 601 917 8558, or email contacto@advancedhealth.com.co. We are available 24/7 via WhatsApp and voice line.

soporte.form_success_desc: We'll contact you within 24 business hours.

footer.brand_desc: World leaders in clinical nutrition and high-impact wellness solutions.

gudd-4.name: Gudd Fiber 300g
gudd-4.description: Gudd Fiber - High-quality dietary supplement based on soy fiber, psyllium, flaxseed, green tea, oats, and dragon fruit extract. Enriched with prebiotics (FOS) and probiotics. Stevia sweetened. Delicious yellow fruits flavor. 300g presentation.

gudd-5.name: Gudd Detox Tea 300g
gudd-5.description: Gudd Detox - Specialized formula with pomegranate, hibiscus, grape seeds, green tea, spirulina, and glucomannan. Enriched with essential vitamins and minerals. Stevia sweetened. Refreshing green apple flavor. 300g presentation.

gudd-2.name: Threepack - Collagen Peptides Gudd 1.5kg
gudd-2.description: Threepack - Comprehensive hydrolyzed collagen supplement. Includes probiotics, choline, whey protein, vitamins A, C, D, E, K, B-complex, and essential minerals like calcium, zinc, iron, and magnesium. No added sugar, stevia sweetened. Vanilla flavor. 3 containers of 500g each.

gudd-1.name: Collagen Peptides Gudd 500g
gudd-1.description: Premium hydrolyzed collagen supplement with probiotics, vitamins, and minerals. Specifically formulated to support joint health and overall vitality. Delicious vanilla flavor, no added sugar.
